body.text:
We believe innovation starts in the field, with growers like you who push boundaries every day. 

That’s where the story of Cazado® began. Faced with the growing challenge of wild oat resistance, the ADAMA Canada team set out to create a solution that would help growers protect their crops without compromise.​

Through countless field walks, honest conversations, and years of trial work, we built something that reflects the way growers innovate every day: by listening, learning, and delivering—together.

Our latest blog shares how Cazado® was brought to life through Value Innovation, a process rooted in real grower insight and collaboration across the field, lab, and globe.​

🔗 Read the full story and see how innovation starts where it matters most: in your fields.

http://bit.ly/4oFFIuj

#InsideValueInnovation

about.text: ADAMA is one of the world's leading crop protection companies.

body.text:
Apply Now: www.ehunar.org
Admissions are open across all Provinces of Pakistan! 

ہماراخواب،  ہنرمند پاکستان !

Hunarmand Programme Initiative | ehunar.org introducing you with the practical & in-depth hands on emerging programs with a 3 Months & 6 Months Certification skillsets, leading you towards the digital world with hands-on practice and Internship opportunities.

Hunarmand Program | ehunar.org is an initiative that is highly supported by the Government of Pakistan to train the youth in different skillsets to create a ground for them in the Government and Private sector for Paid/Unpaid Internships and Jobs. 
 
We are offering 24+ certified courses in the following categories:
- 3 Months Certification Programs
- 6 Months Certification Programs

After completing your course, you'll get an authorized e-certification which ll be verifiable online & also ll be authorized and accredited with Government Institutions. Furthermore, you'll be able to join our Internships Program after completing any course. If you have any questions or need additional information, please don’t hesitate to contact us by email at info@ehunar.org or call 042-37495999 or whatsapp at: 0329-6999909

Wishing you the best of luck in your future endeavors.  

Regards,
Team | ehunar.org 
Hunarmand Kamyab Jawan Program
info@ehunar.org | 042-37495999

about.text: Hunarmand Program (ehunar.org) is an Online Skills Development Program
